name: tiered-development
description: Three-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, Fable refines it and does the final deep review, fresh Opus builders write substantive code, and Sonnet handles mechanical edits, research, and per-step verification — a fresh agent per task so each gets a clean, focused context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and two helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave) the skill calls.
